MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Zanghi, Esq., for plaintiff John Stewart Company. Wes Flowers is present as plaintiff's representative.
Alexander Saunders, Esq., limited scope attorney for defendant Mark Kempton, who is also present.

Settlement Conference Held. Stipulation for entry of judgment filed for property located at 516 O'Farrell Street, #426, San Francisco, California. See scanned document. Trial date vacated. Judge pro tem Will Chen. Clerk Garth Sayers. Not reported. (218)
